rationale: The sole substantive ground-truth concern (yJader's inline comment) explains that already_submitted is irrelevant because both submit_initial and submit_update reject list prompts identically — X reproduces this exact reasoning with matching line citations (stage_pool.py:951-955, 1022-1026), while Y's coverage of the same hunk is vaguer, self-contradictory ('not dead after this change' vs. later suggesting removing it as dead code), and includes unverifiable claims (issue #4839, orchestrator reading .finished/.request_id) not grounded in the shown diff. Y offers more numerous and superficially concrete suggestions (tests, docstring updates) giving it a slight actionability edge, but its lower grounding drags precision and recall well below X's.
